title: 07673_ACE_Off-Policy_Actor-Critic_with_Causality-Aware_Entropy_Regularization
positive_examples: Boosts the efficiency of exploration in reinforcement learning by harnessing causal influences on rewards.
Empowers RL agents to escape local optima with agility, mirroring human cognitive processes.
negative_examples: Navigating the need for stringent safety measures to curb risky behaviors during exploration in real-world environments.
